titleStmt.title: SII 15.103: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 103. (B.K. No. 15 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the prākāra wall of Vīra-Nārāyaṇa temple.
This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Chitrabhānu, Āshāḍha-amāvāsyā, Thursday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1162 A.D., July 14. The weekday, however, was Saturday.

The king who is no other than Bijjaḷa II is mentioned by his titles Bhujabaḷamalla and Tribhuvanamalla. After the king's pras11asti are introduced the One Thousand Mahājanas of Lokkiguṇḍi, who along with all the Gōle, Gō-Brāhmaṇa and the entire residents were protecting the religious deeds. Lokkiguṇḍi is described as an agrahāra founded by the illustrious Rāma. It registers a gift of money to the god Bhōgēśvara by Aḍakeya Mahadēvanāyaka, and others. The latter portion of the epigraph is much damaged. The inscription as revealed by its contents must have originally belonged to Lakkuṇḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śirascuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka
kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvara suva¨rṇnavṛṣabhadhvaja ḍamarugatū¨ryyani¨rgghōṣaṇa kadana pracaṇḍa subhaṭa
rāditya kaligaḷaṁkuśa caladaṁkarāma śrīmatkaḷacu¨ryya cakrava¨rtti bhujabaḷamalla dēvara vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi prava¨rddhamāna mā[caṁdrā¨rkka]tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire Aṁbudhi vēṣṭitāvanitaḷāṁ
ganegoppuva kuṁtaḷapra[dēśaṁbolanū taḷamaṁtada ṟoḷiḷāsadāḷaṁbanamappa
viprarakhiḷa kaḷāpariṇataramaḷacaritaranupamadānabyāpārarapagatapāpa¨rssāsivvaru[¨rvvī]
vinutar . svastiyamaniyama svādhyāyadhyāna dhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānapārāyaṇajapa samādhiśīḷagu
rappa śrī rāmaradatti śrīmallokkiguṇḍiyūroḍeya pramukhamahājanaṁ śrī sāsi[¨rvva]
masta gōle gōbrāhmaṇa¨rmmodalāgi Ābālavṛ[ddha¨rnne]redu dha¨rmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadha¨rmmadiṁ saṁrakṣitamāgi rakṣisuttamire
[Avaroḷage] vaṁśōdbhavanadhikaguṇaprapū¨rṇnanāśritajana divijakuja yaśōdēvananupamamahi
ḍakeyara mahadēvaṁ . vaṁśavāridhisaṁjāta pariraṁjisidaṁ
kī¨rttiyiṁ mahadēvaṁ . svasti śrīmatkaḷacu¨ryya bhujabaḷa cakrava[¨rtti tri]bhuvana malladēvava¨rṣada 7 neya citrabhānu
saṁvatsaradāṣāḍhadamāvāsya bṛhaspativāra sū¨ryyagrahaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu śrī bhōgē śvaradēvara pavitrārō
śrīmadaḍakeya mahādēvanāyakanuṁ śrī dēvanāyakanuṁ tamma taḷabhōgada kēṇiyalu
prati naḍevantāge biṭṭa paṇavaiydu A ya potthagrāhakaṁ yya nāyakaṁ [va¨rṣaṁ]prati naḍevantāgi biṭṭa paṇa voṁ
du 1 kēṟiya hiriya sēnabhōga ṇiyara mallimayyanāyakaṁ va¨rṣaṁ prati naḍevantāgi biṭṭa paṇa voṁdu 1
mane bhōga hiriya
[Ū]roḍeya pramukha śrī sāsi¨rvvar taṁtammadha¨rmmaṁ
gaddeyara kuḷōd�vanāga ḷaṁ guṇaṁge ra paṭṭi śrī
svasti śrīmatsāsi¨rvvara pri mahimeyeṁteṁdaḍe
tō¨rvva vaḷaya
mērusi
¨rssale negaḷdar . svasti samasta
gaṇāḷaṁkṛta cāru cāritra nayavinaya vijñāna � virōdhe
ṇamukhyara śapuravarādhīśvararuṁ [mā¨rtta] ṇṇaruṁ nuḍidaṁte gaṇḍa
tra ka¨rmmani¨rmmāpaṇa śrīmadbhōgēśvaradēva pādapadmārādhaka
sāḷavaru sāsama sāḷavaru boppaṇasāḷa
sāḷava mantida pramukhasamastapaṭṭa
liga caitrapavitrārōpaṇa
drā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍavantāgi ralu biṭṭa . matta
satra
yaraṁ bhāgavaṭṭi vīsavondu
hirapaseṭṭi yammiseṭṭi nāgiseṭṭi
vīsa kāṇiye kāṇiye

brajiṁkhatega satiThe remaining few lines are very much damaged.
Digital edition of SII 15.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
